item.title: Dashrunner - v1.0.9 [Version Update]
item.description:
Platform: Splunk


Release Notes:

minor change to the warn logging becuase there are situations where $$ doesn't mean tokens (e.g. in regexs)


Description:
Dashrunner is a custom command that will parse SimpleXML dashboards, extract searches (based on configurable tokens) and run those searches. Do you have a simple XML dashboard where you want the dashboard results sent via email/slack/etc regularly? Do you wish that a dashboard's results could be summarised and tracked over time? Typically you need to copy the search logic into saved searches to accomplish these goals. Duplicating the logic creates extra maintenance and is error-prone because it does not follow the DRY (Don't repeat yourself https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Don%27t_repeat_yourself) principle of software development. You could reach for a macro (or similar) to store search logic, however, now you have logic in numerous places and it's still difficult to maintain. With Dashrunner you can now store all the logic in one place, inside the dashboard, using hidden tokens. You will still need one or more saved searches, but these are now generic "runners" that typically contain only simple action logic.
item.dc:creator: Chris Younger

item.title: Cyware Intel Exchange - v4.0.0 [Version Update]
item.description:
Platform: Splunk


Release Notes:

This release introduces major enhancements to Cyware Intel Exchange. The following updates streamline indicator management and improve operational efficiency:
1. Manage multiple Cyware instances with new multi-account support.
2. Use KV Store–based data collection as the default ingestion method, with index ingestion now available as an optional configuration.
3. Correlate indicators using field-based matching to identify sightings in Splunk events.
4. Configure data inputs with the new Lookback Days parameter.
5. Fetch enriched indicator data directly from Cyware Threat Intelligence eXchange.
6. Automate indicator lifecycle management by creating indicators, updating status, and managing allowlists, tags, tasks, and notes from within Splunk.
7. Ingest indicators in bulk from Splunk indexes, data models, and lookups with automation support.
8. Automatically delete expired indicators from KV Store lookups.
9. Monitor activity using the new Indicator Overview and Correlation Overview dashboards.
10. Automatically migrate existing index-based data to KV Store storage.
11. Trigger new alert actions in Splunk Enterprise Security using Adaptive Response integration.
12. Experience improved error handling, enhanced proxy configuration support, and more reliable data collection.


Description:
The Cyware Intel Exchange Add-on for Splunk is used to assist the user in the integration of Cyware Intel Exchange with Splunk Enterprise. This application allows the user to perform the following tasks: 1. Seamlessly extract threat intelligence data from Cyware Intel Exchange to Splunk 2. Index and categorize threat intelligence data within Splunk for ease of access 3. Deploy an intuitive dashboard for streamlined data visualization, providing key insights into holistic IOC metrics and subcategories 4. Augment Splunk index indicators with Cyware Intel Exchange data, facilitating a layered analysis and deeper understanding of threat intelligence
item.dc:creator: Cyware Labs

item.description:
Platform: Splunk

Description:
The Rootly Splunk App enables faster response times to service disruptions by leveraging the power of Splunk Alerts. Rootly and Splunk customers can: - Start leveraging Splunk Alerts in Rootly with just one click. - Tailor your incident response workflows across Rootly accounts and services using a single Splunk instance. - Minimize information overload and alert noise by grouping and streamlining alerts. With Rootly and Splunk working together, your organization can achieve faster, smarter, and more efficient incident resolution.
item.dc:creator: Quentin Rousseau

item.title: CCX Add-on for Juniper Products - v1.0.0 [New App Release]
item.description:
Platform: Splunk


Description:
About Us: CyberCX is Australia’s greatest force of cyber security experts. Our highly skilled professional services team operates a 24x7 on-shore security operations centre (SOC) servicing corporate and public sector organisations across Australia and New Zealand, specialising in Security Operations services leveraging Splunk. Description: The CCX Add-on for Juniper Products looks to provide a single field extraction bundle for Juniper NetScreen Firewall and Junos OS using syslog. This TA was built using a large dataset and endeavours to be the most CIM compliant comprehensive field extraction TA available for Juniper logs. Below is the listed products supported: - Juniper Junos OS - Juniper Netscreen Firewall Fully compatible with Splunk Enterprise and Splunk Cloud, built by an Ops team for Ops teams. Features: - This TA currently supports logtypes tagged under the following CIM datamodels: Network Traffic, Authentication, Change, and Intrusion Detection (IDS). - Support available for SYSLOG ingestion. Attribution: - Full credit to the Splunk team for their work and maintenance of the foundation and components 'https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/2847'

item.description:

Attack Path Access: Users with read-only permissions are now immediately redirected to the Attack Path dashboard upon login.
Custom Certificate Toggle: Added a UI toggle to enable/disable custom certificate authentication.
Enhancements -
Config Streamlining: Removed persistent warning pop-ups during production configuration.
Bug Fixes -
Event Truncation: Resolved data loss issue for events exceeding 10,000 bytes.


Description:
The BloodHound Enterprise Splunk app ingests your BloodHound Enterprise data into Splunk. - Use the dashboards to track the Active Directory and Azure attack paths of your environment - Create alerts to detect when new attack paths emerge or new the exposure increases - Enrich your SIEM data with information about the attack paths to and from principals

item.title: Splunk Add-on for Stream Wire Data - v8.1.6 [Version Update]
item.description:
Platform: Splunk


Release Notes:

https://help.splunk.com/en/splunk-cloud-platform/collect-stream-data/release-notes/8.1/release-notes/whats-new


Description:
Splunk Add-on for Stream Wire Data is part of the purpose-built wire data collection and analytics solution from Splunk along with Splunk App for Stream for data visualization and data capture management and Splunk Add-on for Stream Forwarders for data collection. The Splunk App for Stream with the Add-on for Stream Forwarder and Add-on for Stream Wire Data actively or passively capture packets, dynamically detect applications, parse protocols, and send metadata back to your Splunk environment for over 30 protocols and 300 commercial applications. Targeted full packet capture to NAS for forensic investigation of raw packets. Aggregate data using familiar SPL aggregation methods to reduce the volume of data indexed. Capture Flow-type records, including NetFlow v5, v9, jFlow, and sFlow, and IPFIX, and send Flow Records directly into your Indexers, with optional filtering and aggregation. Ingest PCAP files in real-time or on-demand. Create MD5 hashes of file attachments for Threat Intelligence correlations using Splunk ES, and extract and store those reassembled files for forensic or DLP purposes. Parse SQL statements to help understand user intent. Understand IP client-server connections with patent-pending visualization.
item.dc:creator: Splunk LLC

item.title: Nozomi Networks Universal Add-on - v1.3.1 [New App Release]
item.description:
Platform: Splunk


Release Notes:

Release Notes - Nozomi Networks Universal Add-on

Features:
This compatibility enables users to effortlessly retrieve data from both N2OS and Vantage through a single interface.
This streamlined approach simplifies the monitoring and analysis of operational network data.

Nozomi Networks is committed to enhancing the add-on based on user feedback and evolving industry requirements.

For further information, assistance, or feedback, please contact Nozomi Networks support at support@nozominetworks.com.

We hope you enjoy using the Nozomi Networks Universal Add-on and find its capabilities valuable in retrieving data from N2OS and Vantage.

The 1.1.0 improved mapping with CIM
The 1.2.0 receive alert updates and more resilient endpoint configuration
The 1.2.1 better handling of multiple requests
The 1.2.2 Fixed an issue where updated assets were not always sent correctly.
The 1.3.0 Added an optional interval-based asset update mode and updated asset event timestamp extraction to use last_activity_time
The 1.3.1 fixes a regression, the Asset continuous update mode failed when configured against a CMC


Description:
The Nozomi Networks Universal add-on for Splunk provides organizations with a unified solution to retrieve data from Sensors (Guardian), CMC (Central Management Console), and Vantage, streamlining the data collection process. This add-on seamlessly integrates with Splunk to enhance cybersecurity and operational visibility in industrial control system (ICS) and operational technology (OT) environments. The Nozomi Networks Universal Add-on works with N2OS version 24 and higher.
item.dc:creator: Nozomi Networks
